/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/pico_mocap_server.dir/apps/pico_mocap_server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pico_mocap_server.dir/readers/pico_reader.cpp.o -o pico_mocap_server  -Wl,-rpath,/home/weili/GMR-CPP_e1jump_lowdpi/third_party/pico_sdk/lib:/home/weili/GMR-CPP_e1jump_lowdpi/third_party/mujoco/lib ../third_party/pico_sdk/lib/libPXREARobotSDK.so ../third_party/mujoco/lib/libmujoco.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libglfw.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libhiredis.so -lpthread -lGL ../third_party/daqp/build/libdaqpstat.a
